title: DevFlow configuration
description: Schema for .devflow.yaml — the configuration contract for the DevFlow Claude Code plugin.

version.title: Schema version
version.description: Version of the .devflow.yaml schema. Must be 1. The motor rejects incompatible versions before starting any worktree.

base_branch.title: Base branch
base_branch.description: Git branch from which every worktree is created. The motor never operates directly on this branch.

models.title: Model configuration
models.description: AI models used by each phase. Model IDs are opaque to the plugin — they are passed through as-is.

plan.title: Plan model
plan.description: Model used in the planning phase. Prefer a strong reasoning model.

execution.title: Execution model
execution.description: Model used during fan-out execution by specialist agents.

review.title: Review model
review.description: Model used in the self-review phase. Defaults to the plan model if omitted.

commands.title: Project commands
commands.description: Shell commands executed by the motor inside the worktree. All commands are run in the worktree root.

test.title: Test command
test.description: Test suite command. Required. Run after execution; blocks PR if it fails and gates.require_tests_pass is true.

lint.title: Lint command
lint.description: Lint command. Optional — skipped if absent.

build.title: Build command
build.description: Build command. Optional — skipped if absent.

deploy.title: Deploy command
deploy.description: Deploy command. Optional — skipped if absent. Position controlled by gates.deploy_before_pr.

fan_out.title: Fan-out configuration
fan_out.description: Controls parallel specialist agent execution for multi-scope tasks (e.g. monorepos).

enabled.title: Enable fan-out
enabled.description: When true, the motor spawns one specialist agent per discovered scope up to max_agents.

max_agents.title: Max agents
max_agents.description: Maximum number of specialist agents to spawn in parallel. Must be >= 1.

on_partial_failure.title: On partial failure
on_partial_failure.description: Behavior when one or more agents fail: abort cancels the entire run, isolate continues with passing scopes, retry re-runs failed agents.

retry_limit.title: Retry limit
retry_limit.description: Number of automatic retries when on_partial_failure is 'retry'. Only meaningful with on_partial_failure: retry.

gates.title: Gate configuration
gates.description: Controls which checks gate the PR and how the motor behaves at each checkpoint.

require_tests_pass.title: Require tests to pass
require_tests_pass.description: When true, a failing test command blocks the PR. When false, test failures are logged but not blocking.

require_lint_pass.title: Require lint to pass
require_lint_pass.description: When true, a failing lint command blocks the PR. Ignored if commands.lint is not set.

deploy_before_pr.title: Deploy before PR
deploy_before_pr.description: When false (default), the PR is the gate and deploy runs after merge. When true, deploy runs before the PR is opened (e.g. preview/staging environments).

auto_pr.title: Auto PR
auto_pr.description: When false (default), the motor shows the gh pr create command and asks for confirmation. When true, the PR is opened automatically.

draft_pr.title: Draft PR
draft_pr.description: When true (default), PRs are opened as drafts. Set to false to open ready-for-review PRs directly.

require_diff_review.title: Require diff review
require_diff_review.description: When true (default), the motor shows a git diff and asks for confirmation before committing. Set to false to skip this step.

ci_timeout.title: CI timeout (seconds)
ci_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for CI checks after opening the PR. Set to 0 to disable CI polling.

fallback.title: Specialist fallback
fallback.description: Behavior when no specialist agent is found for the task scope.

mode.title: Fallback mode
mode.description: generic: use the plugin's built-in generic agent. refuse: stop and ask the user to create a specialist.

generic_agent.title: Generic agent path
generic_agent.description: Path to a custom generic agent file. Optional — defaults to the plugin's bundled generic agent.

spec.title: Spec tool integration
spec.description: Optional integration with an external spec/requirements tool.

tool.title: Spec tool
tool.description: Name of the external spec tool. When absent, no spec step is managed.

require_approved.title: Require approved spec
require_approved.description: When true and spec.tool is set, the motor requires an approved spec before generating tasks.

limits.title: Resource limits
limits.description: Optional limits on resource usage per run.

max_tokens_per_run.title: Max tokens per run
max_tokens_per_run.description: Estimated token budget per run. 0 means no limit. When exceeded, behavior is controlled by on_limit.

on_limit.title: On limit
on_limit.description: Behavior when max_tokens_per_run is exceeded: confirm asks the user to proceed, abort stops immediately.

retry_limit.title: Retry limit
retry_limit.description: Number of automatic retries on test or lint gate failure. Applies to gates, not fan-out agents.

telemetry.title: Telemetry
telemetry.description: Controls structured run logging (JSONL files per run).

enabled.title: Enable telemetry
enabled.description: When true (default), each run writes a JSONL file with phase events, timings, and specialist routing.

path.title: Telemetry path
path.description: Directory where JSONL run files are written.
